Contents of `/tmp`:

**Files (8)**
- `candidate-comps.docx` (~19 KB) and `ref.docx` (~11 KB) — Word documents
- `first_part.txt` / `last_part.txt` — two ~60 KB text files (same size, likely split halves of something)
- `last_line.json` — small (343 B) JSON file
- `default.profraw` — empty profiling raw file (just created)

**Directories (5)**
- `claude-502`, `claude-mcp-browser-bridge-adnan` — Claude-related caches
- `codex-browser-use` — Codex browser tooling
- `pdf-build` — PDF build artifacts
- `powerlog` — system power logs (root-owned, empty)

**Sockets (9)** — IPC sockets for running/recent apps:
- Cursor (`Cursor-*.sock`, `cursor-askpass-*.sock`)
- Sublime Text
- Six `zeb_def_ipc_*` sockets (Zebra/zsh-related daemons from May 12)

Nothing unusual — typical macOS `/tmp` mix of app sockets, scratch files, and tool caches.

result:
Contents of `/tmp`:

**Files (8)**
- `candidate-comps.docx` (~19 KB) and `ref.docx` (~11 KB) — Word documents
- `first_part.txt` / `last_part.txt` — two ~60 KB text files (same size, likely split halves of something)
- `last_line.json` — small (343 B) JSON file
- `default.profraw` — empty profiling raw file (just created)

**Directories (5)**
- `claude-502`, `claude-mcp-browser-bridge-adnan` — Claude-related caches
- `codex-browser-use` — Codex browser tooling
- `pdf-build` — PDF build artifacts
- `powerlog` — system power logs (root-owned, empty)

**Sockets (9)** — IPC sockets for running/recent apps:
- Cursor (`Cursor-*.sock`, `cursor-askpass-*.sock`)
- Sublime Text
- Six `zeb_def_ipc_*` sockets (Zebra/zsh-related daemons from May 12)

Nothing unusual — typical macOS `/tmp` mix of app sockets, scratch files, and tool caches.
